lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਅਨਿਤ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਟੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਅਰੋਗ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aas anit guramukh mittai naanak naam arog |1|
lines.english: Hopes and desires for transitory things are erased for the Gurmukh; O Nanak, the Name alone brings true health. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਨਿ ਮਿਨਿ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਮਨੈ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਰਪਰ ਚਲਨੋ ਲੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: gan min dekhahu manai maeh sarapar chalano log |
lines.english: See, that even by calculating and scheming in their minds, people must surely depart in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਗਾ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਗੁਣ ਰਵਹੁ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਜਪਿ ਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: gagaa gobid gun ravahu saas saas jap neet |
lines.english: GAGGA: Chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe with each and every breath; meditate on Him forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਾ ਬਿਸਾਸਾ ਦੇਹ ਕਾ ਬਿਲਮ ਨ ਕਰਿਹੋ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: kahaa bisaasaa deh kaa bilam na kariho meet |
lines.english: How can you rely on the body? Do not delay, my friend;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਬਾਰਿਕ ਨਹ ਜੋਬਨੈ ਨਹ ਬਿਰਧੀ ਕਛੁ ਬੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: neh baarik neh jobanai neh biradhee kachh bandh |
lines.english: there is nothing to stand in Death's way - neither in childhood, nor in youth, nor in old age.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹ ਬੇਰਾ ਨਹ ਬੂਝੀਐ ਜਉ ਆਇ ਪਰੈ ਜਮ ਫੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: oeh beraa neh boojheeai jau aae parai jam fandh |
lines.english: That time is not known, when the noose of Death shall come and fall on you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀ ਧਿਆਨੀ ਚਤੁਰ ਪੇਖਿ ਰਹਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਇਹ ਠਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: giaanee dhiaanee chatur pekh rehan nahee ih tthaae |
lines.english: See, that even spiritual scholars, those who meditate, and those who are clever shall not stay in this place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਾਡਿ ਛਾਡਿ ਸਗਲੀ ਗਈ ਮੂੜ ਤਹਾ ਲਪਟਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: chhaadd chhaadd sagalee gee moorr tahaa lapattaeh |
lines.english: Only the fool clings to that, which everyone else has abandoned and left behind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਏ ਸਫਲ ਤੇ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਿਅਹਿ ਸੁਹਾਗ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naanak aae safal te jaa kau prieh suhaag |19|
lines.english: O Nanak, blessed and fruitful is the coming of those who obtain the Beloved Lord as their Husband. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਰਹੈ ਜਾਹੂ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗ ॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad simarat rahai jaahoo masatak bhaag |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one who has such good destiny written on his forehead remembers the Lord in meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੋਖੇ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਬੇਦ ਸਭ ਆਨ ਨ ਕਥਤਉ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ghokhe saasatr bed sabh aan na kathtau koe |
lines.english: I have searched all the Shaastras and the Vedas, and they say nothing except this:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦੀ ਹੁਣਿ ਹੋਵਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aad jugaadee hun hovat naanak ekai soe |1|
lines.english: "In the beginning, throughout the ages, now and forevermore, O Nanak, the One Lord alone exists." ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਘਾ ਘਾਲਹੁ ਮਨਹਿ ਏਹ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਦੂਸਰ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghaghaa ghaalahu maneh eeh bin har doosar naeh |
lines.english: GHAGHA: Put this into your mind, that there is no one except the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਹੋਆ ਨਹ ਹੋਵਨਾ ਜਤ ਕਤ ਓਹੀ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: neh hoaa neh hovanaa jat kat ohee samaeh |
lines.english: There never was, and there never shall be. He is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਾਲਿ ਘਾਲਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਪਛੁਤਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghaal ghaal anik pachhutaaveh |
lines.english: So many work and slave continually, but they come to regret and repent in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੂਲਹਿ ਤਉ ਮਨ ਜਉ ਆਵਹਿ ਸਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: ghooleh tau man jau aaveh saranaa |
lines.english: You shall be absorbed into Him, O mind, if you come to His Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਤਤੁ ਕਲਿ ਮਹਿ ਪੁਨਹਚਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: naam tat kal meh punahacharanaa |
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, only the Naam, the Name of the Lord, shall be of any real use to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਹਾ ਥਿਤਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin har bhagat kahaa thit paaveh |
lines.english: Without devotional worship of the Lord, how can they find stability?

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੋਲਿ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਤਿਹ ਪੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: ghol mahaa ras amrit tih peea |
lines.english: They alone taste the supreme essence, and drink in the Ambrosial Nectar,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਦੀਆ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak har gur jaa kau deea |20|
lines.english: O Nanak, unto whom the Lord, the Guru, gives it. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਙਣਿ ਘਾਲੇ ਸਭ ਦਿਵਸ ਸਾਸ ਨਹ ਬਢਨ ਘਟਨ ਤਿਲੁ ਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: ngan ghaale sabh divas saas neh badtan ghattan til saar |
lines.english: He has counted all the days and the breaths, and placed them in people's destiny; they do not increase or decrease one little bit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਙੰਙਾ ਙ੍ਰਾਸੈ ਕਾਲੁ ਤਿਹ ਜੋ ਸਾਕਤ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕੀਨ ॥
lines.translit: ngangaa ngraasai kaal tih jo saakat prabh keen |
lines.english: NGANGA: Death seizes those whom God has made into faithless cynics.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਨ ਲੋਰਹਿ ਭਰਮ ਮੋਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇਊ ਗਵਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeevan loreh bharam moh naanak teaoo gavaar |1|
lines.english: Those who long to live in doubt and emotional attachment, O Nanak, are total fools. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਙਿਆਨ ਧਿਆਨ ਤਾਹੂ ਕਉ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: ngiaan dhiaan taahoo kau aae |
lines.english: They alone find spiritual wisdom and meditation,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਜੋਨਿ ਜਨਮਹਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੀਨ ॥
lines.translit: anik jon janameh mareh aatam raam na cheen |
lines.english: They are born and they die, enduring countless incarnations; they do not realize the Lord, the Supreme Soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਿਹ ਆਪਿ ਦਿਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa jih aap divaae |
lines.english: whom the Lord blesses with His Mercy;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਚੀ ਗਾਗਰਿ ਸਰਪਰ ਫੂਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaachee gaagar sarapar foottai |
lines.english: The vessel of clay shall surely break.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜੀਵਤ ਜਿਹ ਜੀਵਤ ਜਪਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: so jeevat jih jeevat japiaa |
lines.english: They alone live, who, while alive, meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਙਣਤੀ ਙਣੀ ਨਹੀ ਕੋਊ ਛੂਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: nganatee nganee nahee koaoo chhoottai |
lines.english: no one is emancipated by counting and calculating.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਭਏ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਹ ਛਪਿਆ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: pragatt bhe naanak neh chhapiaa |21|
lines.english: They are respected, O Nanak, and do not remain hidden. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਿ ਚਿਤਵਉ ਚਰਣਾਰਬਿੰਦ ਊਧ ਕਵਲ ਬਿਗਸਾਂਤ ॥
lines.translit: chit chitvau charanaarabind aoodh kaval bigasaant |
lines.english: Focus your consciousness on His Lotus Feet, and the inverted lotus of your heart shall blossom forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਚਾ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਗੁਰ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: chachaa charan kamal gur laagaa |
lines.english: CHACHA: Blessed, blessed is that day,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਭਏ ਆਪਹਿ ਗੋੁਬਿੰਦ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤ ਮਤਾਂਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pragatt bhe aapeh goubind naanak sant mataant |1|
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe Himself becomes manifest, O Nanak, through the Teachings of the Saints. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਿ ਧਨਿ ਉਆ ਦਿਨ ਸੰਜੋਗ ਸਭਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan uaa din sanjog sabhaagaa |
lines.english: when I became attached to the Lord's Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰ ਬਿਚਾਰ ਬਿਨਸਿਓ ਸਭ ਦੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: chaar bichaar binasio sabh dooaa |
lines.english: By pure lifestyle and meditation, all duality is removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਕੁੰਟ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਆਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: chaar kuntt deh dis bhram aaeo |
lines.english: After wandering around in the four quarters and the ten directions,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਈ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਤਬ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: bhee kripaa tab darasan paaeo |
lines.english: God showed His Mercy to me, and then I obtained the Blessed Vision of His Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿੰਤ ਬਿਸਾਰੀ ਏਕ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੇਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: chint bisaaree ek drisattetaa |
lines.english: Anxieties are forgotten, and the One Lord alone is seen,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਜਨੁ ਜਿਹ ਨੇਤ੍ਰਾ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: naanak giaan anjan jih netraa |22|
lines.english: O Nanak, by those whose eyes are anointed with the ointment of spiritual wisdom. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਹੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang man niramal hooaa |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the mind becomes immaculate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਦਸਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aisee kirapaa karahu prabh naanak daas dasaae |1|
lines.english: Show such Mercy, O God, that Nanak may become the slave of Your slaves. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਾਤੀ ਸੀਤਲ ਮਨੁ ਸੁਖੀ ਛੰਤ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: chhaatee seetal man sukhee chhant gobid gun gaae |
lines.english: The heart is cooled and soothed, and the mind is at peace, chanting and singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਛਾ ਛੋਹਰੇ ਦਾਸ ਤੁਮਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: chhachhaa chhohare daas tumaare |
lines.english: CHHACHHA: I am Your child-slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸ ਦਾਸਨ ਕੇ ਪਾਨੀਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: daas daasan ke paaneehaare |
lines.english: I am the water-carrier of the slave of Your slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਛਾ ਛਾਰੁ ਹੋਤ ਤੇਰੇ ਸੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: chhachhaa chhaar hot tere santaa |
lines.english: Chhachha: I long to become the dust under the feet of Your Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:
